keepDashEndMoveMaxInput.AltName: Dash end movement input sensitivity maximum [%]

turnTriggerMinAngleIdleAndWalk.AltName: Standby & walking steep turn input angle [deg]

turnWalkSpeedPercentage.AltName: Standby & walking sharp turn speed ratio [%]

atkEndTurnTriggerMinAngleWalk.AltName: When starting to walk after attack, wait & walk and sharp turn Input angle [deg]

atkEndTurnTriggerMinAngleJog.AltName: When starting to walk after attacking, running and turning sharply Input angle [deg]

atkEndTurnTriggerMinAngleDash.AltName: When starting to walk after attack Dash sharp turn Input angle [deg]

atkEndTurnWalkSpeedPercentage.AltName: When starting to walk after attack, standby & walking sharp turn speed ratio [%]

ladderGraspInputTime.AltName: Ladder grab occurrence Required input time [sec]

ladderMoveInputTime.AltName: Ladder movement occurrence Required input time [sec]

nearDeathAnimMaxBlendHpRate.AltName: Dying anime maximum blend HP percentage [%]

nearDeathAnimMinBlendHpRate.AltName: Dying anime minimum blend HP percentage [%]

flickInputFrame.AltName: Play input Number of play detection input frames

flickInputPower.AltName: Play input Play detection input strength

dashAttackMinSpeedAnimScale.AltName: Dash attack minimum speed animation speed multiplier

dashAttackMaxSpeedAnimScale.AltName: Dash attack maximum speed animation speed multiplier

autoPivotInputTime.AltName: Direction change turning input judgment time

dashBlendInLockOnWalkSpeed.AltName: Dash blend entry judgment speed (lock movement) [m/sec]

equipDurabilityRateMin.AltName: Equipment durability value reduction amount Correction magnification minimum [times]

equipDurabilityRateMax.AltName: Equipment durability value reduction amount Correction magnification maximum [times]

noTargetAttackMaxUpperAngle.AltName: Upper body angle upper limit when attacking

noTargetAttackMaxLowerAngle.AltName: Upper body angle lower limit when attacking

darkAttackWeaponIntPercent.AltName: Dark attack power reflection ratio Reason Weapon [%]

darkAttackWeaponFaithPercent.AltName: Dark attack power reflection ratio Faith Weapon [%]

darkAttackMagicIntPercent.AltName: Dark attack power reflection ratio Reason Dark magic [%]

darkAttackMagicFaithPercent.AltName: Dark attack power reflection ratio Faith Dark magic [%]

darkAttackMiracleIntPercent.AltName: Dark attack power reflection ratio Reason Dark Miracle [%]

darkAttackMiracleFaithPercent.AltName: Dark attack power reflection ratio Faith Dark miracle [%]

fLookAtVisibilitySideMax.AltName: LookAt Recognition limit angle left and right [deg]

fLookAtVisibilityUpperMax.AltName: LookAt Recognition limit angle Up and down [deg]

fLookAtRotationSideSpeedMax.AltName: LookAt Left and right turning speed [deg/sec]

equipDurabilityCoverRate.AltName: Equipment durability value Reduction amount when taking over Correction magnification [times]

shieldCutBonusS.AltName: Shield cut rate bonus multiplier S

shieldCutBonusA.AltName: Shield cut rate bonus multiplier A

shieldCutBonusB.AltName: Shield cut rate bonus multiplier B

shieldCutBonusC.AltName: Shield cut rate bonus multiplier C

shieldCutBonusD.AltName: Shield cut rate bonus multiplier D

shieldCutBonusE.AltName: Shield cut rate bonus multiplier E

hitDurabilitySubValue.AltName: Weapon durability reduction during melee attacks

guardDurabilitySubValue.AltName: Weapon durability reduction amount when guarding

meleeShootDurabilitySubValue.AltName: Weapon durability reduction when firing melee bullet
